violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as raw eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and/or debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink in bar area was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC added additional quat tablets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. PIC labeled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
PIC stated establishment par cooks the chicken wings. PIC informed to request a variance. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
Inspector observed single-use items stored on the floor in the kitchen and bar area. Items must be stored at least 6 inches from the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the glass cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025
Establishment is lacking drain plugs for 3 bay kitchen sink. PIC informed. Establishment uses dishwasher to wash and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

The dumpster and grease receptacle outside is located on (or partially on) grass/dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025

The floors (specifically behind equipment) and walls in the kitchen area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Inspector provided RIDOH Employee Health agreement during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Several food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024
Cases of raw chicken were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean throughout the facility. Inspector observed several boxes of single service items being stored on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The ceiling of the walk-in was not in good repair. Inspector observed a small leak and small bulge in the ceiling at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2024

The floor in the kitchen behind grill equipment has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
